reason.description: Very brief evidence-based explanation for your decision. Keep it short.

task_delta_summary.description: Optional short human-readable summary of how pending tasks should be adjusted. Prefer 1-3 short lines. Useful for streaming UI.

task_deltas.description: Required when suggestion is adjust_plan. Array of delta operations on pending tasks. ref_task_index uses the task index shown in Progress (e.g. 1-2, 1-3). All indices refer to the state BEFORE any deltas are applied.

op.description: insert_after: insert new tasks after ref_task_index; append: add tasks at the end; remove: delete a pending task; modify: change name/goal of a pending task; replace_all: replace ALL remaining pending tasks

ref_task_index.description: Target task index (e.g. '1-2'). Required for insert_after, remove, modify.

tasks.description: New tasks to add. Required for insert_after, append, replace_all.

updated_name.description: New name for the task (for modify op only).

updated_goal.description: New goal for the task (for modify op only).
